name: knack
description: Spec-driven workflow and skills for AI coding agents: sharpening, specs, test-driven and examples-based development, atomic PR grouping, and more

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven workflows and skills for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Portable spec-driven development workflows, shared skills, and focused agent definitions for planning, implementing, reviewing, and publishing code changes.
defaultPrompt: Create a spec for this feature.
Run the knack workflow for a new feature.
Prepare this branch for a draft PR.
